MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT HANDLERY HOTELS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (AS TO HANDLERY'S CROSS-COMPLAINT).
APPEARANCES: Jessica R. Madrigal, Esq. of Nossaman LLP 398-3600 for moving party Handlery; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Continued To Oct-26-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT HANDLERY HOTELS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Jessica Madrigal, Esq. of Nossman LLP (415) 398-3600 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Hearing held and the tentative ruling is vacated. Counsel for defendant informs the Court that the cross-complaint is still active, and that the defendant has only been dismissed from the complaint. RULING: The matter is continued to October 26, 2009 for hearing for cross-complainant Handlery Hotels, Inc. Motion for summary judgment. Counsel to notice other side of the continuance. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Aug-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Handlery Hotels, Inc.'s Motion to compel responses to Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production; And For Sanctions; and for sanctions granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges;
2. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses to defendant's form interrogatories, special interrogatories and requests for production within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-30-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220

Notice Fo Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Patrick J. Richard, Esq., for defendant/Cross-Complainant and moving party: Handlery Hotels, Inc.
Andrew J. Stern, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Azoulay Enterprises, Inc.

After hearing, Defendant/Cross-Complainant Handlery Hoters, Inc.'s Application For Right To Attach Order And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is granted, writ of attachment shall issue for $135,255.00.
Bond Undertaking in the amount of $75,000 shall be filed before issuance of writ. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
